title: DWT Corpus Scenario
description: A single scenario in the waste-movement corpus. Each entry describes one path through the BA's flow chart, tagged against the seven-axis taxonomy. The corpus is regenerated by the Import app whenever the source flow chart changes.

id.description: Stable identifier of the form C-NNNN, where NNNN is zero-padded. IDs are assigned at extraction time and SHOULD remain stable across re-extractions where the underlying scenario shape is unchanged.

name.description: Human-readable label summarising the scenario. Generated by the Import app from the axis tuple, e.g. 'Carrier, real-time collection, accept-all, no cycles'.

axes.description: The seven-axis taxonomy. Every value is mechanically derived from the decision points the path traverses.

initiator.description: Who creates the movement and mints the Movement ID.

collectionRecording.description: When and how the collection event is recorded.

receiptOutcome.description: What the receiver decides at the gate. acceptPart variants split the load into two parallel flows; the variant indicates which side this scenario tracks.

receiptRecording.description: When and how the receipt event is recorded. 'na' applies when no receipt event occurs (full rejection, or producer-tracking-only paths).

finalState.description: Terminal state of the path: Accepted-at-Receiver-Receiver, reconciled-by-Carrier, observed-by-Producer, or Waste-Returned-with-Producer.

cycles.description: Loop edges traversed. Cycle exclusivity is enforced at extraction: at most one cycle per scenario.

compliance.description: Derived: any deferred-and-not-reconciled trajectory is non-compliant. Stored explicitly to make filtering and validation possible.

path.description: Ordered list of node labels from the Mural flow chart, as walked from start to terminal node. This is the raw extraction output and the source-of-record for the axis tags.

source.description: Provenance metadata, populated by the Import app. Lets us trace a corpus entry back to a specific extraction run.

muralBoardId.description: Identifier of the Mural board the scenario was extracted from.

extractedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the extraction run that produced this entry.

nodeCount.description: Number of nodes in the source diagram at extraction time. Useful for spotting structural changes between runs.

edgeCount.description: Number of edges in the source diagram at extraction time.
